title: Create: Stuff & Crafts
body:
A mod ispired from the tinkers' construct mod but directly linked with Create Mod.

The idea starts from finding a "Crushed Raw Aluminum Ore" in creative, there I thinked "Why do not make a mod that adds aluminum".
I started adding aluminum tools, chrome and at the end I added the Tinkers' like things.

Actually you can only get iron and his ingot - it's only the first beta - in future I'll add more ores and more things to smelt

![Available on Forge 1.20.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/539214207463c6f4e97025066c93fa4d70fa1696.png)
